name: S-6 --check-tier-matches-severity enforces P0 rules require >=1 published-standard provenance entry per the architecture
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r, severity: P0, provenance: [{source: g, class: pr-corpus, section_id: "1.1", url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:abc}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rubric-provenance.sh" --tree tree --check-tier-matches-severity 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -qiE 'P0|tier|published-standard' err.txt && echo enforced 1>&2
